programmes.show_description: DJ Hamza is in the mix and he's bringing pure heat from Middlesbrough, blending the slickest sounds from R&B, hip-hop and Afrobeats, to Bollywood, Punjabi and Bhangra.

...Throwbacks with DJ Manara. It's a throwback extravaganza - the Pure Spice way. Contains strong language.

programmes.show_name: The Everyday Hustle with Harleen Nottay
programmes.show_description: Gulshen Bano, who runs female only self defence groups around the world, joins Harleen Nottay to discuss how she went from working in a pharmacy to running this business.

programmes.show_name: The Everyday Hustle with Harleen Nottay
programmes.show_description: The founder of nutritional coaching business, Ravneet Panesar joins Harleen Nottay. The pair discuss how her company helps teach women how to heal their relationship with food.

programmes.show_name: Asian Network Motivation with Sarover Aulja
programmes.show_description: Always saying yes when you mean no? Sarover explores people pleasing in South Asian communities, setting boundaries and choosing yourself.

Can you piece together the Popcorn Puzzle? Also, you're the DJ before 12 with This or That, but which Surjit Bindrakhia track will you pick to celebrate his birthday?

DJ Kizzi soundtracks your Saturday nights with the biggest and best tunes, Asian anthems and mixes.

Nonstop Asian Network bangers!
